chapter_title.en: Chapter on Eating and Drinking From Gold and Silver Utensils and Other Etiquettes of Eating

text: 4251 - وَ قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "صَاحِبُ اَلرَّحْلِ يَشْرَبُ أَوَّلَ اَلْقَوْمِ وَ يَتَوَضَّأُ آخِرَهُمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4251 - The Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"The owner of the provision will drink first among the people and performs ablution last among them."
